titleStmt.title: SII 23.165: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 165. (A.R. No. 165 of 1907.) Pēraiyūr, Tirumayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District Nāganāthasvāmi temple—on the north wall of the Kāṭchikoḍutta-Nāyanār shrine Māṟ. Kulaśēkhara I: year 22: 1289-90 A.D.

summary.p: This is damaged. It registers the sale of the permanent tenancy right over a dēvadāno land known as Ponnāvayakkal by the Araiyars and the Mudalis of Malaiyālaṅguḍi to the same Māḍāpatyam Veṉṟāṉ Tirumaḻapāḍi-Uḍaiyāṉ Tirupperunduṟaippiḷḷai with the taxes thereon remitted at their cost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . komāṟupaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉacakravattikaḷ Emmaṇṭala muṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrī kulacekaratevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 3vatu kā
nāṭāṉa virutarājabhayaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭu tevatāṉa brahmadeśan tirup peraiyūr Uṭaiyār tirunāgiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār
tirukkoyil māṭāpattiyam veṉṟān tirumaḻapāṭi Uṭaiyāṉāṉa tirup peruntuṟaippiḷḷaikku Iṉṉāṭṭup pa
ṭaippaṟṟu malaiyālaṅkuṭi Araiyarkaḷaṇaivomu maṟamutalikaḷaṉaivomum Ivaṟku Iṟaiyili kuṭiṉiṅkāt tevatāṉamā
ka viṟṟanilamāvatu Ātaṉkuṭikkuḷa nirpāyntu nelviḷaiyum villi yāmaḻakiyatevaṉ poṉṉāvayakkal paṅki
lum Irācarāca nāṭāḻvāṉ poṉṉāvayakkal kiṇaṟun tuṭavalukkum perunāṉkellaiyāvatu kiḻpāṟkel
lai Inṉāyaṉār tevatāṉam nāñcikkuṭikkāṭṭaṉervāy
Iṉāṉkellaikku ṉāṭṭiṉa catācivatevaṟkum Irācarāca nāṭāḻvār poṉṉāvayakkalukkum vaṭakkum melpāṟke
llai Uttamacoḻa nāṭāḻvār poṉṉāvayakkal paṟkalaikaḷukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Iṉṉāyaṉār paḻantevatā
ṉam tirunāgicvaravayakkalukkum mañcakkuḷattiṉ vāykkut teṟkum Āka yicainta perunāṉkellaikkuṭpa
ṭṭa kiṉokkiya kiṇaṟiraṇṭum meṉokkiṉa maramum cevvalum koṭṭiyūr nāṭāḻvāṉ periyāṉ vayakkalum
tikkaṉeri kuḷattil malaikkāṭāy villa viramayateviyuḷḷiṭṭāṟkum kūṟṟu nālattoṉṟum Āka
kuṭikku vaṭṭattāl Aiñcu ṉāḻikkaru kku Ātaṉkuṭikkaḷattil ṉirpāyyāy
k karāḷaṉvayakkal teṉ keṉiṉṟu kiḻakku nokkiyum Icceyk kiḻ varampukkeṉiṉṟu vaṭakku ṉokki
ya paḻavāykkāl veṭṭikkoḷḷavum Uttamacoḻaṉāṭāḻvāṉaiyum vayakkal paṟkālum kiḻvarampil mā
piyaṟku Ātaṉkuṭikku tal vaṭṭattāliraṇṭu nāḻikai ṉirum viṭak kaṭavomākavum
vaṟkuc cilvari peruvari
nāṅkaḷe Iṟuppomāṉom .
Digital edition of SII 23.165 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
